mapper.update: UPDATE blog_site_stats SET page_views = page_views + 1 WHERE id = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_site_visitor ( visitor_key, ip_address, user_agent, first_path, first_visit_time, last_visit_time ) VALUES ( #{visitorKey}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{visitPath}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visitor_key = visitor_key
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT page_views FROM blog_site_stats WHERE id = 1) AS pageViews, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_site_visitor) AS uniqueVisitors
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_site_pv_daily (stat_date, page_views) VALUES (#{statDate}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE page_views = page_views + 1
INSERT IGNORE INTO blog_site_uv_daily_detail (stat_date, visitor_key) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{visitorKey})
INSERT INTO blog_site_uv_daily (stat_date, unique_visitors) VALUES (#{statDate}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unique_visitors = unique_visitors + 1
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pv.stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, pv.page_views AS pageViews, COALESCE(uv.unique_visitors, 0) AS uniqueVisitors FROM blog_site_pv_daily pv LEFT JOIN blog_site_uv_daily uv ON uv.stat_date = pv.stat_date WHERE pv.stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (#{days} - 1) DAY) ORDER BY pv.stat_date
